reviews.comment:
Es un excelente lugar a mitad de camino entre Mar del Plata y Buenos Aires para descansar, estirar las piernas y comer algo rico dentro del local de servicios o bajo la sombra del inmenso parque arbolado que cuenta con mesas y bancos.

(Translated by Google)
It's an excellent place halfway between Mar del Plata and Buenos Aires to relax, stretch your legs, and eat something delicious inside the service area or under the shade of the immense tree-lined park with tables and benches.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCd3REampBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención es lo mejor. Llegamos de noche cuando estaban cerrando y nos calentaron los sandwiches para comer algo caliente. Sin lo más. Gracias!

(Translated by Google)
The service is the best. We arrived at night when they were closing and they warmed up our sandwiches so we could have something hot to eat. Absolutely fantastic. Thank you!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCak5Xb3B3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La comida caliente es muy mala. Pocas disponibilidad de productos. Lo que ofrecen en la foto de la comida ni cerca es lo que terminas consumiendo.

(Translated by Google)
The hot food is terrible. There's very little variety. What you see in the pictures is nothing like what you end up eating.
